experiment_title: 品红溶液加热变色实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="品红溶液加热变色实验" goal="观察品红溶液在加热前后颜色的变化，以探究其热稳定性和性质变化" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="measuring_cylinder_1" type="measuring_cylinder" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="test_tube_holder_1" type="test_tube_holder" />
      <Component id="alcohol_lamp_1" type="alcohol_lamp" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Exp5_1_Solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Fuchsin_Solution" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="measuring_cylinder_1" reagent="SO2" volume="2 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="measuring_cylinder_1" to_vessel="test_tube_1" volume="2 mL" id="step_1" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="C20H19N3·HCl" volume="0.1 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_2" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_3" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_1" support="test_tube_holder_1" id="step_4" />
      <Heat vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_5" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_6" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 准确量取二氧化硫溶液并转移至试管，加入品红溶液，静置混合。
将试管固定在试管夹上，为加热做准备。
加热试管并观察品红溶液颜色的变化。
